sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40018" key="e)pile/pw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλέπω</orth>, <sense id="n40018.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strip of bark</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄζον ἐ. σιδήρῳ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">109</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
